text:
Created attachment 255633
[PATCH] sysutils/rubygem-winrm: Update to 2.3.9

Changelog: https://github.com/WinRb/WinRM/blob/main/changelog.md

Updated devel/rubygem-nori dependency, added new textproc/rubygem-rexml dependency.

Tested basic functionality in Poudriere on 13.3, 13.4, and 14.1, everything appears sane.
